method: maker≠checker — fresh project-factory reviewers over the working-tree diff (implementer did not review)
verdict: clean — all confirmed findings resolved or deferred-with-rationale; no blockers

specCompliance.note: FR-ACCT-02 live balance figures correctly deferred to the ledger slice (documented), not dropped

resolvedFindings.summary: Malformed (non-UUID) id could produce a raw 500 in Postgres mode, contradicting the no-500 error-surface contract.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Added a UUID guard in AccountsService.requireActive: a malformed id resolves to AccountError('not-found') on both backends. Regression test added.

resolvedFindings.summary: ensureSeededDefault cold-start race: two concurrent first renders could both insert the seed, tripping the single-default index.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Seed insert is now race-tolerant — on insert failure it re-reads findDefault() and returns the winner instead of throwing.

resolvedFindings.summary: EmptyState branch on the accounts page is unreachable given the preceding seed.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Kept as the screen's required empty state (FR-SHELL-03) with a comment noting it is a defensive guard.

resolvedFindings.summary: Name-length validation lacked a backing spec scenario.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Added the 'empty or over-long account name is rejected' scenario to the accounts spec.

resolvedFindings.summary: tasks.md checkboxes were all unchecked despite a complete implementation.

deferredFindings.summary: No upper bound on the number of accounts (unbounded growth via the unauthenticated action).
deferredFindings.rationale: Low real-world risk for a single-user local PWA (v1, BC-SCOPE-01); revisit when multi-user lands.

deferredFindings.summary: Redirect-based error surface discards the user's typed input on a validation failure.
deferredFindings.rationale: Accepted v1 UX cost of the ?formError= pattern (master playbook); name-too-long is unreachable via the 60-char input cap anyway.
